title: andropogon sorghum var. halepensis
intro: Andropogon sorghum var. halepensis, also known as durra, is a variety of grain sorghum that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Andropogon sorghum var. halepensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
